# Jongeun Kim — AI Engineer

> Portfolio of Jongeun Kim (김종은), AI Engineer — multimodal AI (VLM/LLM, video understanding). Publications, patents, and project case studies (HDC LABS: home AI agent, elevator situational analysis, fire detection).

## Pages
- [Home](https://joannekim0420.github.io/): Profile, career overview, and tabbed publications / patents / news / research
- [Career — HDC LABS](https://joannekim0420.github.io/career/hdclabs/): Home AI agent / elevator situational analysis / fire detection project deep-dives
- [Career — UNIST](https://joannekim0420.github.io/career/unist/): M.S. in Artificial Intelligence — multilingual multimodal, LG utterance generation, slogan generation, LOVEU challenge
- [Career — NC Soft](https://joannekim0420.github.io/career/ncsoft/): Machine-translation quality evaluation internship
- [Career — Sangmyung University](https://joannekim0420.github.io/career/smu/): B.S. in Human Intelligence Information Engineering

## Full content
- [llms-full.txt](https://joannekim0420.github.io/llms-full.txt): the entire site content + data in one plain-text file (best for feeding to an LLM)
